sqlMap.select: SELECT coupon_id, code, discount_type, discount_val, min_order, expire_date, CASE WHEN #orderAmount# < min_order THEN 0 WHEN discount_type = 'F' THEN discount_val WHEN discount_type = 'R' THEN (#orderAmount# * discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END AS computed_discount FROM coupon WHERE coupon_id = #couponId# AND used_yn = 'N' AND expire_date >= #today#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE coupon SET used_yn = 'Y' WHERE coupon_id = #couponId#
